message.content:
@startuml
title Send file to inbox

actor User
participant "REST" as REST #LightBlue2
box "" #WhiteSmoke [1]
  participant "Lookup Service\n#908FCA" as LookupService #LightCyan3
end box
box "" #WhiteSmoke [4]
  participant "VFS Service\n#FF7D6A" as VFSService #PinkSalmon
end box
box "" #WhiteSmoke [5]
  participant "Storage Service\n#BDBDFE" as StorageService #LavenderBlush
end box
database S3 #Azure

User ->> LookupService : get User2 inbox info 🔐(login/password)
activate LookupService
return User2 🗝️**public key** and /inbox access creds 
deactivate LookupService 

note over User,VFSService,S3: encrypt and save file to user's inbox location  
VFSService->S3:persistence
activate S3
return success
deactivate S3


@enduml
